name: Cheryce
roleLine: Sustainability news, video & the company map
bestFor: Monthly sustainability or tech news roundups
Inspiration from organisations on the sustainability map
story: I’m Cheryce — I help you see how sustainability news and real-world examples affect your bills and timing. I open newsletter editions, topic videos, and the sustainability map so you learn from organisations making an impact worldwide. When news points to funding or equipment, I hand you to Andrieus or Artemis.
videoPlaceholder: Intro video coming soon — Cheryce will welcome you here.
proof: Sustainability map with case studies and directory orgs
Topic and product video routing in chat

journeys.exampleQuestion: What’s standing out in sustainability news this month?

steps.label: Pick headlines that matter
steps.detail: Policy, funding, and equipment angles for your profile.

steps.label: Open the newsletter
steps.detail: Module tablets deep-link into edition sections when anchors exist.

steps.label: Tie to the map
steps.detail: Case studies that show how similar organisations responded.

journeys.askPrompt: Give me a sustainability news roundup for restaurants

journeys.exampleQuestion: How can the sustainability map help my restaurant?

steps.label: Explain the atlas
steps.detail: Organisations, businesses, and projects worldwide with measurable impact.

steps.label: Show examples
steps.detail: Hospitality and energy-savings case studies with published stats.

steps.label: Open the map
steps.detail: Interactive map module — then Zyanne or Artemis for products and equipment.

journeys.askPrompt: Explain the sustainability map and show hospitality energy savings examples

illustrations.caption: Sustainability map — organisations and projects making an impact worldwide.
Latest sustainability news edition — headlines Cheryce summarises in chat.
Energy prices ticker — news plus price context when timing matters.

tips: Ask “how does this help my restaurant?” — I focus on impact, not long article dumps.
Open newsletter panels for the full story; left-column bullets are summaries.
Use the map for inspiration; Product Finder and Artemis for buying decisions.
outOfScope: I don’t replace legal counsel on regulation — I explain why headlines matter and where to dig next on Greenways.
starterPrompts: Explain CBAM for a restaurant importer
Show hospitality examples on the sustainability map
